LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND JOSE CISNEROS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO BOTH CAUSES OF ACTION. COURT STATES FINDINGS AND REASONS IN OPEN COURT, WITH BOTH COUNSEL PRESENT AND AS SET FORTH IN THE TRANSCRIPT OF THE CERTIFIED SHORTHAND REPORTER. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, E-MAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM. (L&M302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorneys, Amy Silverstein and John Ormonde of the law offices of Silverstein & Pomerantz LLP (415-593-3502) appear as counsels for plaintiff/opposing party

Deputy City Attorney, Thomas S. Lakritz of the San Francisco City Attorney's office (415-554-3963) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification as stated on the record.

DEFENDANTs CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and JOSE CISNEROS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED as to both causes of action. Court states findings and reasons in open court, with both counsel present and as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.
